top_signals.title: European stocks mixed: UK inflation and elevated bond yields in focus
top_signals.summary: European stocks were mixed on Wednesday as global markets keep a close eye on elevated bond yields and UK inflation data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Europe Is Losing The AI Race as Energy Costs Soar
top_signals.summary: The second energy crisis in four years is further eroding Europe’s industrial competitiveness as energy costs are spiking again and undermining the European ambition to compete with the United States and China to attract AI and data center developments. Energy costs in Europe are so much higher than in the U.S. or Asia, and the grid stability is so fragile and in dire need of modernization and upgrades that many European countries are out of the competition for hosting new data/AI centers. In addition, Europe’s already congested grid…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: U.S. Treasury yields inch lower as bond markets price 'significant' inflation risk - CNBC
top_signals.summary: U.S. Treasury yields inch lower as bond markets price 'significant' inflation risk  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Asian countries boost Ebola precautions after WHO declaration
top_signals.summary: Officials say the likelihood of local transmission remains low, and no cases have been publicly confirmed in Asia.
